name: The Long Exhale
specialty: A formidable team of fire wielders, renowned for their ability to manipulate and control the flames, setting them apart in the chaotic world of the Undercity

members.name: Kaela Suntouched
members.note: Scarred from years of battling the rifts, her eyes are always shrouded behind a veil, hinting at the secrets she carries

members.name: Thoren Stonebreaker
members.note: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, his past loyalties often create tension within the group

members.name: Zephyr Ravenwing
members.note: His physical prowess is matched only by his fierce loyalty to the Wardens of Ash, making him a formidable ally and an intimidating adversary

visual: Clad in armor made from repurposed rift metal, they move with a grace born of years of working in the treacherous Undercity. Each wears a mask to protect against the city's dust and a unique crest denoting their affiliation with the Wardens of Ash
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity of their unwavering dedication to the Wardens of Ash and their fearsome skill in harnessing the city's ever-present flames
